config.combatnumbers.title: Combat Numbers
config.combatnumbers.option.theme.toolti: Selects the base theme. Leave blank for no theme. Resource packs and custom server data are layered on top of the theme.
config.combatnumbers.option.theme.off.de: No theme applied. Clean slate for resource packs, datapacks or server overrides.
config.combatnumbers.option.renderMode.t: Changes how combat numbers are rendered.
config.combatnumbers.option.baseFontSize: How large the text is. This is also affected by your GUI scale setting.
config.combatnumbers.option.nearFadeDist: Text will begin fading out from this distance (in blocks) as you get nearer.
config.combatnumbers.option.maxRenderDis: Maximum distance (in blocks) at which the text is rendered.
config.combatnumbers.option.distanceFall: Distance (in blocks) at which text will begin to appear smaller in size.
Distance (in blocks) at which the text reaches its minimum scale.
config.combatnumbers.option.distanceMinS: Minimum scale at max distance falloff.
config.combatnumbers.option.reset.toolti: Reset this option to its default value.
config.combatnumbers.resetAll.tooltip: Reset all options to their default values.
config.combatnumbers.server.title: Combat Numbers
config.combatnumbers.server.option.maxRe: Server broadcasts combat events to clients within this range (in blocks).
